home.heroEyebrow: India, redrawn for the curious traveler
home.heroTitle:
Slow journeys.
Real India.
Designed around you.
home.heroSubtitle: Hand-crafted private journeys across India — from the palaces of Rajasthan to the backwaters of Kerala. No coach groups. No script. Only India, the way you want to meet it.
home.featuredSubtitle: Each itinerary is a starting point — every detail is reshaped around the way you want to travel.
home.storyTitle:
Two countries.
One shared way of seeing the world.
home.storyBody: We are an Italian-Indian team, working between Florence and New Delhi, designing private journeys for European travelers who want India without the filter — the food, the families, the festivals, the silence of a Himalayan dawn. We have been doing this for over fifteen years, with a small team, on the ground, all year round.
home.why1Title: Designed by humans, refined by AI
home.why1Body: Tell our AI assistant what you love and dislike. Our designers turn it into a private itinerary, hand-checked by an India specialist.
home.why2Body: Our local team in India is on call 24/7 in your language, throughout your trip. Real people, not a chatbot, when something matters.
home.why3Body: Smaller routes, family-run hotels, locally guided experiences. We pay our partners fairly and we tell you exactly where your money goes.
home.why4Body: Italian, English, German, French — your guide, your driver, your itinerary documents. Travel without translation friction.
home.testimonial1: The most thoughtful trip we have ever taken. Our designer understood what we wanted before we did. Twenty days, not one wasted moment.
home.testimonial2: We travelled with our two teenagers. The team handled everything — every guide spoke fluent French, every hotel was hand-picked. Magical.
home.testimonial3: I have travelled in India four times. This was the first time I felt I was truly meeting it. Bravissimi.
home.ctaSubtitle: Tell us a few things — when, how long, what you love. We'll come back within 24 hours with a draft journey, no obligation.

about.title: Our story
about.p1: ItalioIndia was born from a friendship between two travelers — one Italian, one Indian — who had spent years showing each other their countries, and realized that the way they did it for each other was the way they wanted to do it for everyone.
about.p2: Today we are a team of fifteen, based between Florence and New Delhi. Our designers are Italian, French, German and English speakers. Our guides are Indian, fluent in your language, and have lived all their lives in the regions they show you.
about.p3: We work without packages. Every journey begins with a conversation: what do you love, what tires you, what do you want to bring home? From there, we build. Our AI assistant can help you start — but every itinerary is finalized by a human, with a phone, in India.
about.p4: We are members of the Travel Foundation and Tourism Cares. We work only with locally owned partners, we pay above industry rates, and we publish our impact report every year.
about.value1Body: Fewer places. More time. Real connection.
about.value2Body: Local guides, local hotels, local kitchens. Always.
about.value3Body: We tell you what India is — and what it is not.

chat.title: Trip designer
chat.subtitle: Powered by AI. Reviewed by humans.
chat.placeholder: I'd like to spend two weeks in India in November, with my partner. We love food and history…
chat.disclaimer: Suggestions are AI-generated. A human designer will refine your itinerary before booking.
chat.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your India trip designer. Tell me what kind of journey you dream of — when, how long, what you love — and I'll suggest a starting itinerary.
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, I couldn't reach the AI right now. Please try again, or use the contact form.
